description: Deny-by-default baseline for the frameless quick-capture window (HLD §8.2): only command invocation and the AppEvent channel are granted, matching the main window. The global shortcut that toggles this window is registered Rust-side, so no `global-shortcut` JS permission is granted here. Feature permissions are added explicitly as the corresponding HLD §6 commands land — never broadly. See Architecture §9/§12.
